salesforce.label: Salesforce focus
salesforce.plan_line: Salesforce for CRM — opportunities, accounts, pipeline, and ownership via SOQL.
salesforce.base_notes: Read opportunities, accounts, contacts, leads, and custom objects via the official Salesforce DX MCP server using run_soql_query (data toolset). Strong for pipeline, stage, amount, and close-date analysis. Read-only is enforced by a read-only permission set on the authenticated org user — the data toolset still ships record DML, so the permission set, not the toolset pin, is the guardrail; --toolsets=data only limits the loaded surface (see SETUP.md). SOQL reads only; never create, update, or delete records, deploy metadata, or run Apex.
